business.name: Total Property Solutions Pro LLC
business.address_note: Full street address not found in CREDENTIALS_MASTER.md — update this field with the exact street address before using for citations
business.description_short: Commercial cleaning and janitorial services in Albany NY and the Capital Region. Specializing in make-ready cleaning, post-construction cleanup, and ongoing property maintenance for property managers and business owners.
business.description_long: Total Property Solutions Pro LLC provides commercial cleaning, janitorial services, make-ready cleaning, post-construction cleaning, and property maintenance throughout Albany NY and the Capital Region. We work with property managers, commercial landlords, and business owners who need reliable, professional cleaning done right the first time. From routine janitorial contracts to one-time deep cleans and construction site cleanouts, TPS Pro delivers consistent results with no surprises.

citations.api_notes: API available via POST /CreateBusinesses but requires partner onboarding with Microsoft. Not feasible for single-location submission.

citations.action: Manual signup at businessconnect.apple.com — API access is enterprise/partner-only (Yext, PinMeTo). Standard businesses use the web portal.
citations.api_notes: Apple Business Connect API exists but is restricted to certified third-party integration partners (Yext, PinMeTo). Not accessible for direct submission.

citations.action: Search Facebook for 'Total Property Solutions Pro' to check if page exists. If not, create via pages/create.

api_research_notes.bing_places: Bing Places API exists (PDF docs at bpprodpublicstorage.blob.core.windows.net/bingplacesapi/BingPlaces_API_v1.0.pdf). Requires partner onboarding — not a public API for individual businesses. Contact: partneronbp@microsoft.com. The CreateBusinesses endpoint supports 1-1000 locations per call but requires authenticated PUID credentials provisioned by Microsoft.
api_research_notes.apple_maps: Apple Business Connect API exists but is restricted to certified integration partners (Yext, PinMeTo, etc.). Standard businesses use the web portal at businessconnect.apple.com. As of April 2026, Apple merged Apple Business Connect + Apple Business Manager into 'Apple Business' at businessconnect.apple.com.
api_research_notes.angi: No public API for new business registration. Angi does have a lead delivery API for existing partners but this requires an established account. Manual signup at signup.angi.com/pro required first.
api_research_notes.homeadvisor: HomeAdvisor's API is lead-delivery focused (Webhooks/API for receiving leads), not for submitting a new business listing. Manual registration at pro.homeadvisor.com required first.
api_research_notes.bbb: No API — fully manual application process. Accreditation fee varies by business size. High SEO authority value.
api_research_notes.citation_automation: For future automation at scale, consider using Yext or BrightLocal — both have APIs that push listings to 50+ directories simultaneously. Yext starts at ~$199/year but handles Bing, Apple Maps, YP, Foursquare, and many others automatically.
